author: machdragon
name: XSA + EMA 0.997 + Periodic KURE Sweep (No Tanh)
blurb: PR #287 base with Overtone removed and periodic KURE gating via KURE_EVERY to preserve compression gains while recovering wallclock throughput.
notes: Default Track A: XSA_LAST_N=4, EMA_DECAY=0.997, KURE_LAMBDA=0.001, R2_LAMBDA=0.0, KURE_EVERY=8, TANH_REPARAM=0.
